canvas.title: Intuitive Visual Editor
canvas.subtitle: Create your workflows with ease using our visual editor. Connect steps, define rules, and visualize your processes in real-time.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In three simple steps, create and launch your workflows

step1.title: Create your workflow
step1.description: Use the visual editor or AI assistant to create your custom workflow.

step2.title: Configure steps
step2.description: Define forms, decisions, and actions for each step of your process.

step3.title: Launch execution
step3.description: Start your workflow and track its execution in real-time with detailed monitoring.

demo.title: Request a demo
demo.description: Fill out the form below and we'll contact you quickly to organize a demonstration.
demo.betaNotice: Currently, the solution is in testing phase.
demo.success: Your demo request has been sent successfully! We'll contact you soon.

workflowEditor.unconnectedPortsWarningDescription: Connect the missing links, or save anyway. You can safely fix the graph later.
workflowEditor.chooseCategory: Choose a category to organize this workflow
workflowEditor.chooseIcon: Choose an icon to visually identify this workflow
workflowEditor.activeDesc: Enable or disable this workflow. Inactive workflows cannot be executed.
workflowEditor.enableApi: Enable API triggers for this workflow

workflowEditor.enablePortalDesc: Make this workflow available on the company's public portal for anonymous submissions

workflowEditor.specific: Specific - Only selected users and groups can execute
workflowEditor.dataStructureDesc: Define fields for this workflow's data

workflowEditor.updateField: Update a field to your data structure

workflowEditor.updateStatus: Update a status option for this workflow

workflowEditor.deleteStatusConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this status?

workflowEditor.assignmentFieldNoUserFields: No top-level user fields are available in the workflow data structure.
workflowEditor.assignmentRequiredWarning: This step type requires an assignment source or an explicit user/group assignment.

workflowEditorStepNotifications.assignmentEnabledHint: When off, no assignment or reminder emails are sent for this step. Turn on to configure message style and reminders.

You have been assigned {{Task Name}}.

workflowEditorStepNotifications.multipleRemindersHint: Add one or more reminders (for example: 1 day, then 3 days).

mcp.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
mcp.description: Connect AI clients and tools to your organization with a standardized integration layer.
mcp.whatIsBody: MCP provides a standard way for AI assistants to access approved tools and data sources without building custom integrations for each client.
mcp.step1: Generate and store your organization API key securely before connecting any MCP client.
mcp.step2: Configure your MCP-compatible client with your organization endpoint and credentials.
mcp.step3: Limit available tools to the minimum required set and review access regularly.
mcp.securityNote: Treat MCP credentials like production secrets: rotate compromised keys immediately and avoid exposing them in frontend code or public repositories.

splitPdf.title: Split PDF
splitPdf.noCompany: Select a company to split PDFs.
splitPdf.description: Upload a PDF, run OCR, then use AI to suggest page ranges per document. Edit the plan and create separate files.
splitPdf.stageProposing: Analyzing with AI and proposing the split…
splitPdf.metadataKeysRequired: Select at least one metadata field to extract.
splitPdf.namingRequired: Enter additional instructions (file naming, comments, extraction hints).
splitPdf.metadataKeysHint: Choose which fields the model should fill for each output file. Keys with a predefined list must use one of the allowed values.
splitPdf.metadataKeysEmpty: No metadata keys are defined for this organization. Add keys in Metadata Keys, then return here.
splitPdf.namingRulesPlaceholder: Optional: how to name files, extra context, or renaming rules. The AI uses this together with the selected metadata.
splitPdf.reviewHint: Thumbnails on the left, segments on the right. Exclude pages you do not want in any output file (they are skipped). Click a page for a large preview with zoom and rotate; edit names and split or merge from the strip.
splitPdf.keepOriginalFileHint: Turn on to keep the uploaded PDF. When off, it is deleted after the new files are created.
splitPdf.ocrCreatedFilesHint: Run OCR on each split PDF in the background (same as uploading with OCR).
splitPdf.createdOcrQueued: OCR is running in the background for the new files.
splitPdf.originalRemoveFailed: The new files were saved, but the original PDF could not be removed. Delete it manually from documents if you still want it gone.
splitPdf.segmentsAdjustedOverlap: Some page ranges overlapped. They were adjusted so each page belongs to at most one output file.
splitPdf.segmentsAdjustedInvalid: Some invalid page ranges were removed before creating files.
splitPdf.noValidSegmentsToCreate: No valid page ranges remain. Adjust the split plan and try again.
splitPdf.missingOcr: Configure OCR on the server (OCR_API_KEY) so the PDF can be read before splitting.
splitPdf.missingGemini: Configure Gemini on the server (GEMINI_API_KEY) so AI can propose page ranges.
splitPdf.missingOcrAndGemini: Configure OCR (OCR_API_KEY) and Gemini (GEMINI_API_KEY) on the server to use PDF split.
splitPdf.pageStrip: Each row shows the pages for one output file (or skipped pages) next to its details. Choose a preview size. Use Split here / Merge between pages, or click a page to enlarge.
splitPdf.gapBlockHint: These pages are not included in any file. Use ↻ on a thumbnail to add a page back into a segment.
splitPdf.fallbackStripHint: Thumbnails unavailable — colored bars match segments by position.
splitPdf.pageExpandedDescription: Enlarged page preview with zoom and rotate
splitPdf.thumbsError: Could not load PDF for thumbnails.
splitPdf.pageExcludedHint: This page is not part of any segment. It will not be included in the created files.
splitPdf.noSegments: No pages belong to a segment yet. Use “Include page” on a thumbnail or undo exclusions.
splitPdf.includePageFailed: Could not attach this page to a segment. Adjacent pages may need to be included first.
splitPdf.previewError: Could not load the PDF preview.
splitPdf.presetsHint: Save and reuse extraction templates for this organization.
splitPdf.personHint: Optional: store created files in this person's folder.
splitPdf.presetAppliedWithMissingKeysDescription: {{count}} metadata key(s) from this preset no longer exist and were skipped.
splitPdf.presetConfigRequired: Select metadata keys and add instructions before saving a preset.
splitPdf.presetDeleteConfirm: Delete this preset for the whole company?

metadataDocuments.treeHideKeyLabelsHint: Hide metadata key names next to each level; only the value is shown.
metadataDocuments.deleteSelectedDescription: This will permanently delete {{count}} document(s). This cannot be undone.
metadataDocuments.deleteSelectedPartial: Deleted {{success}} document(s); {{fail}} could not be deleted
metadataDocuments.uploadDescription: Upload one or more files and optionally add metadata. You can run OCR and extract metadata with AI (same as Split PDF).
metadataDocuments.uploadPersonHint: Optional — files are stored in the person's root folder.
metadataDocuments.uploadDocumentTypeHint: Optional — applies extraction fields and naming instructions after OCR.
metadataDocuments.uploadDropHint: Drag and drop files here or browse
metadataDocuments.uploadExtractMetadataHint: After OCR completes, selected fields are filled using Gemini from the OCR text.
metadataDocuments.historyEmpty: No events recorded for this document yet.
metadataDocuments.extractMetadataDialogDescription: Choose the metadata keys to extract from OCR for “{{name}}”.
metadataDocuments.extractMetadataDialogDescriptionNoFile: Choose the metadata keys to extract from OCR.
metadataDocuments.extractMetadataRenameInstructionsPlaceho: Example: Rename as invoice number + supplier, short and clean.
metadataDocuments.extractMetadataRenameInstructionsHelp: Leave empty to keep the current file name.
metadataDocuments.extractMetadataSuccessDescription: Selected keys have been filled from OCR.
metadataDocuments.extractMetadataSuccessDescriptionWithRen: Selected keys have been filled from OCR and the file was renamed to “{{name}}”.
metadataDocuments.renameDialogDescription: Update the name for “{{name}}”. The extension is kept as-is.
metadataDocuments.renameDialogDescriptionNoFile: Update the file name. The extension is kept as-is.
metadataDocuments.renameHelp: Only the name can be changed. The file extension cannot be edited.
metadataDocuments.bulkExtractDialogDescription: Run AI metadata extraction on {{eligible}} of {{selected}} selected files (OCR completed required).
metadataDocuments.bulkExtractNoOcrEligible: No selected files have completed OCR yet.
metadataDocuments.bulkExtractSuccessDescription: AI extraction completed for {{success}} file(s). {{skipped}} file(s) were skipped (OCR not completed).
metadataDocuments.bulkExtractFailedDescription: AI extraction failed for all selected eligible files.

imageAnnotation.title: Edit image
imageAnnotation.dialogDescription: Draw and add text annotations, then save to replace the current file.
imageAnnotation.loadFailedDescription: The image could not be opened for editing. Check your connection or try again.
imageAnnotation.inlineLoadFailure: Image could not be loaded in the editor. Supported types: PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP, BMP, AVIF.
imageAnnotation.exportFailedDescription: Export failed. Try again or use a smaller image.
imageAnnotation.inlineExportFailure: Export can fail if the source host blocks canvas export for signed URLs (CORS).
imageAnnotation.supportedFormatsHint: Supported for editing: PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP, BMP, AVIF. SVG and HEIC/HEIF are not supported.
